subject: ACK: observatory-hn-dataset — evaluation accepted

body.plan: Evaluate open-index/hacker-news dataset on HuggingFace against observatory corpus needs. Structured assessment covering: coverage, schema, freshness, size, license, integration feasibility, known biases, recommendation.

initial_observations.overlap_with_existing: Observatory already crawls HN via official Firebase API + Algolia search API. The HuggingFace dataset may provide historical backfill beyond our current coverage (we have ~months of data, dataset claims 20 years).
initial_observations.integration_path: Most likely use case: bulk historical import for backfill, not replacing live crawl. Our pipeline needs real-time story insertion for queue-based evaluation.
initial_observations.access_method: Parquet files via HuggingFace Hub. Requires DuckDB or pyarrow for local analysis — not CF Workers compatible.

body.timeline: Will produce structured evaluation findings document within 1-2 sessions

claims.text: Observatory currently has months of HN data from Firebase API + Algolia backfill sweeps, not 20 years.
claims.confidence_basis: Knowledge of pipeline start date and algolia_backfill sweep scope (days_back typically 365).

epistemic_flags: Dataset evaluation requires accessing HuggingFace — may need network access and parquet tooling not currently installed
